OVERRULED AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 1, 2, 3, 6, 7, 8, 11, 20, 21, 22, 23, 26, 27, 33, 35, 39, 45, 48 AND 55. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE AND CONFER WITH THE OTHER SIDE FOR FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses; Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. ((1) Plaintiff Leon Girard's Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Specific Interrogatories is denied. Numbers 105-108 are irrelevant. Number 137 is not in the separate statement, but it is irrelevant. Number 143 is irrelevant and invades attorney client privileges. All requests for sanctions are denied.
(2) Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents From Defendant is granted as Defendant is ordered to verify that all responsive documents have been produced and that Defendant has made diligent search and reasonable inquiry for all responsive documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Documents responsive to Numbers 20, 23, and 24 shall be produced upon the entry of a protective order to be agreed upon by counsel. This order is made despite Plaintiff's failure to submit a separate statement pursuant to C.R.C 3.1020. All requests for sanctions are denied.
(3) Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Requests For Admission is granted. Defendant's objections are overruled and ordered stricken. Defendant is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2007 Set For Trial On Apr-07-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-20-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 622

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF LEON GIRARD'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER OF WHITE CAP CONSTRUCTION SUPPLY INC. IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 5, 25, 30, 31, 32, 34, 36, 37, 38, 40, 41, 42, 43, 49, 50, 52, 53, 56 and 57 BECAUSE THESE MAKES NO SENSE, ARE MERELY DENIALS OF PLAINTIFFS ALLEGATIONS OR ARE DUPLICATIVE.
SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 4, 9, 10, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 24, 28, 29, 44, 46, 47, 51 AND 54 TO STATE FACTS SUPPORTING THE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE IF DEFENDANT CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH.
OVERRULED AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 1, 2, 3, 6, 7, 8, 11, 20, 21, 22, 23, 26, 27, 33, 35, 39, 45, 48 AND 55. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE AND CONFER WITH THE OTHER SIDE FOR FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/X-DS
